globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://challenges.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.blob.core.windows.net https://img.clerk.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.clerk.com https://*.clerk.dev https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://clerk-telemetry.com https://*.azurewebsites.net https://*.ingest.us.sentry.io; frame-src https://*.clerk.com https://*.clerk.dev https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://challenges.cloudflare.com; worker-src 'self' blob:
